recommendations.title: Infamous
recommendations.overview: Two young lovers rob their way across the southland, posting their exploits to social media, and gaining fame and followers as a result.

recommendations.title: Christine
recommendations.overview: In 1974, television reporter Christine Chubbuck struggles with depression and professional frustrations as she tries to advance her career.

recommendations.title: Batman
recommendations.overview: The Dynamic Duo faces four super-villains who plan to hold the world for ransom with the help of a secret invention that instantly dehydrates people.

recommendations.title: Cindy La Regia
recommendations.overview: When Cindy decides that she doesn't want to marry her boyfriend, she runs to Mexico City, where new friendships and unexpected paths teach her that there are so much more possibilities on her life and her talent than she imagines.

recommendations.title: The Guide to the Perfect Family
recommendations.overview: A couple in Québec deals with the pitfalls, pressure and high expectations of raising kids in a society obsessed with success and social media image.

recommendations.overview: A young man meets and instantly falls in love with an engaged woman.
